allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); text=data[0]['text']; frames=[l for l in text.split\('\\n'\) if '<frame' in l and 'name=' in l]; [print\(f\) for f in frames[:60]]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(t['path']\) for t in data.get\('tree',[]\) if 'entry-preview' in t['path'] or t['path']=='.nojekyll']")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(t['name']\) for t in data if 'entry' in t['name'] or 'preview' in t['name']]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('version:', d.get\('version'\)\); print\('bin:', list\(d.get\('bin',{}\).keys\(\)\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(d.get\('scripts',{}\), indent=2\)\); print\('---devDeps:'\); [print\(k,v\) for k,v in d.get\('devDependencies',{}\).items\(\) if 'storybook' in k.lower\(\) or 'ghpage' in k.lower\(\) or 'pages' in k.lower\(\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('bin:', d.get\('bin'\)\); print\('main:', d.get\('main'\)\)")
